name: Nobody Cares About You! - Invisible - Perception/Presence Alteration (RPG)
description:
What if you could turn ON and OFF your presence?

Recommended: Use the "Chat Memory" box to save information about characters you meet and important events inside your story.

The concept is simple: you have the power of Perception Alteration, and you can control how people perceive you and your actions. From Becoming Invisible to Altering Their Common Sense and even Making Anyone Hallucinate if you want.

Art by Inaka no Kenshi (Banpurai)
creator: jmjm
